description: Make Section G (Kesimpulan) fully automatic - auto-generate Catatan Dokter and Rekomendasi based on examination data, replace manual textareas with read-only displays, update live as form is filled.
steps: Add generateCatatanOtomatis() function that produces a summary of abnormal findings
Add generateRekomendasiOtomatis() function that generates recommendations based on findings
Replace Section G textareas with read-only styled displays
Update Section G header to indicate fully automatic generation
Remove manual Diperiksa Oleh field or make it auto-only
Update updateStatusPreview() to also update catatan and rekomendasi displays
Update simpanTestKesehatan() to use auto-generated values
Add event listeners on ALL relevant form fields (sections A-F) for real-time updates
acceptance_criteria: Catatan Dokter is auto-generated based on examination data with abnormal findings listed
Rekomendasi is auto-generated with specific advice per condition
Section G fields are read-only displays, not editable textareas
All relevant form fields in sections A-F trigger live updates to Section G
Edge cases handled: no data, partial data
findings: Implemented fully automatic Section G. Two new functions (generateCatatanOtomatis, generateRekomendasiOtomatis) analyze all form data and produce catatan/rekomendasi text. Manual textareas replaced with read-only div displays. Event listeners added on 11 input fields, 8 select fields, and all disease checkboxes for real-time updates. File grew from ~35KB to ~47KB, still well under 100KB. node --check passes.
